complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Initialize Next.js Project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the Next.js project initialization into discrete setup steps including project creation, TypeScript configuration, Tailwind customization, Supabase integration, Drizzle ORM setup, folder structure creation, development tools configuration, and environment variable setup.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity due to multiple technology integrations (Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Supabase, Drizzle). Well-defined setup tasks with clear dependencies. Already has 8 appropriate subtasks covering all major components.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into database design phases: Supabase project setup, Drizzle schema definition for each table (User, Memo, Category), foreign key relationships implementation, database indexing strategy, migration setup, and connection configuration with performance optimization.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Higher complexity due to database design decisions, ORM configuration, and performance considerations. Requires careful planning of relationships, indexing, and migrations. Multiple interconnected components need coordination.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down authentication into: Supabase Auth configuration, user registration implementation, login functionality, session management setup, protected route middleware, email verification flow, logout implementation, and row-level security policies configuration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to security implications, multiple authentication flows, and integration with Supabase Auth. Requires careful handling of sessions, tokens, and security policies. Critical system component affecting all user interactions.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Create Basic UI Layout and Navigation
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide UI development into: main layout component creation, responsive navigation implementation, App Router setup with protected routes, authentication pages design, dashboard layout creation, theme toggle functionality, and loading states with error boundaries.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity involving responsive design, routing, theme management, and user experience considerations. Multiple UI components need coordination and consistent styling patterns.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Structure CRUD implementation into: API routes creation for memo operations, memo creation form with validation, memo list view with pagination, memo detail/edit interface, deletion functionality with confirmation, auto-save feature implementation, and input sanitization for security.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Significant complexity due to full CRUD operations, pagination, real-time features (auto-save), and security considerations. Core functionality requiring robust error handling and user experience optimization.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Integrate Web Speech API for STT Functionality
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down speech integration into: browser compatibility checking, Web Speech API client setup, voice recording component with controls, real-time transcription display, microphone permission handling, error handling and recovery, browser fallback implementation, and voice command detection.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to browser API limitations, real-time processing, permission handling, and cross-browser compatibility challenges. Requires extensive error handling and fallback strategies.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Integrate OpenAI API for Content Summarization
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Structure AI integration into: Claude API client setup with authentication, summarization service implementation, prompt engineering for Claude's conversation format, API response caching system, background job processing setup, retry logic with exponential backoff, and cost management with token counting.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity involving external API integration, cost optimization, async processing, and AI prompt engineering. Requires robust error handling, rate limiting, and performance optimization.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide classification system into: Claude API integration for categorization, predefined category system implementation, custom category creation functionality, confidence scoring system, manual override interface, category suggestion engine, category management UI, and Claude API client configuration with rate limiting.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity combining AI integration, user interface design, and data management. Requires sophisticated confidence scoring, user customization options, and API optimization strategies.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Structure search functionality into: PostgreSQL full-text search implementation, search API with fuzzy matching, advanced filtering interface creation, search result highlighting and ranking, autocomplete and suggestions system, saved search functionality, and search analytics tracking.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity requiring database optimization, complex query building, UI components for filtering, and performance considerations for large datasets. Multiple interconnected features need coordination.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Develop User Statistics and Analytics Dashboard
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down analytics into: data collection system implementation, memo frequency visualization charts, category distribution analytics, time-based activity analysis, user streak tracking system, and personal data export functionality with aggregation jobs for performance.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity involving data visualization, statistical calculations, and performance optimization. Requires chart libraries integration and data privacy considerations but follows established patterns.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Data Security and Privacy Features
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Structure security implementation into: data encryption at rest and in transit, API rate limiting and validation, GDPR compliance features (data export/deletion), audit logging system, content moderation for shared content, backup and recovery procedures, secure API key management, and security monitoring setup.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Very high complexity due to critical security requirements, regulatory compliance (GDPR), and multiple security layers. Requires deep security knowledge, careful implementation, and comprehensive testing strategies.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Structure deployment into: Vercel project configuration with Next.js optimizations, performance optimization implementation leveraging Vercel features, production environment variable setup with security, Vercel Analytics and monitoring configuration, and comprehensive production deployment testing with load testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity involving performance optimization, deployment pipeline setup, and production monitoring. Already has 5 well-defined subtasks covering Vercel-specific optimizations and Next.js integration.
